Compute array index offset and count for a time window

Source: R/fetch.R
dot-time_index_range.Rd

Translates a start/end time range into 0-based array indices for the read_mdim offset/count parameters.

Usage

.time_index_range(time_enc, start_time, end_time, timescale = "1hr")

Arguments

time_enc

list from .read_zarr_time_encoding

start_time

character or POSIXct; start of window (NULL = beginning)

end_time

character or POSIXct; end of window (NULL = end)

timescale

character; "1hr" or "day"

Value

list with integer offset and count

On this page
